MINI MINUTES: No appearances:

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANTS DAVID BLANZ and KAREN BLANZ AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint alleges facts re: actual present controversy between parties regarding coverage/amount of loss. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Alice Chang, CSR# 13654. (D501)

AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-28-2014 Continued To Apr-25-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2014 Continued To Apr-23-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No apperances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS DAVID BLANZ and KAREN BLANZ'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to April 23, 2014. Parties are to provide supplemental briefing no later than April 11, 2014 regarding availability of declaratory relief under the facts of these case. Cases cited in the moving and opposition papers are distinguishable. Supplemental briefing shall not exceed 5 pages, excluding exhibits, if any. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk B. Paredes, Not Reported. (501)
